trans-unit.source: Invalid test application builder type. Expected 'TestApplicationBuilder'.
trans-unit.target: Ungültiger Testanwendungs-Generatortyp. „TestApplicationBuilder“ wurde erwartet.

trans-unit.source: JUnit XML report file
trans-unit.target: JUnit-XML-Berichtsdatei

trans-unit.source: JUnit XML report
trans-unit.target: JUnit-XML-Bericht

trans-unit.source: The JUnit report file '{0}' already exists and will be overwritten.
trans-unit.target: Warnung: Die JUnit-Berichtsdatei „{0}“ ist bereits vorhanden und wird überschrieben.

trans-unit.source: '--report-junit-filename' file name argument must end with '.xml' (e.g. --report-junit-filename myreport.xml)
trans-unit.target: Das Dateinamenargument „--report-junit-filename“ muss mit „.xml“ enden (z. B. „--report-junit-filename myreport.xml“)

trans-unit.source: '--report-junit-filename' file name part must not be empty (e.g. --report-junit-filename myreport.xml)
trans-unit.target: Das Dateinamensteil „--report-junit-filename“ darf nicht leer sein (z. B. „--report-junit-filename myreport.xml“)
Invalid test application builder type. Expected 'TestApplicationBuilder'.

trans-unit.source: JUnit XML report file
trans-unit.target: JUnit XML report file

trans-unit.source: JUnit XML report
trans-unit.target: JUnit XML report

trans-unit.source: The JUnit report file '{0}' already exists and will be overwritten.
trans-unit.target: The JUnit report file '{0}' already exists and will be overwritten.

trans-unit.source: '--report-junit-filename' file name argument must end with '.xml' (e.g. --report-junit-filename myreport.xml)
trans-unit.target: '--report-junit-filename' file name argument must end with '.xml' (e.g. --report-junit-filename myreport.xml)
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--report-junit-filename"}, file extension {Locked=".xml"}, or example command {Locked="--report-junit-filename myreport.xml"}.

trans-unit.source: '--report-junit-filename' file name part must not be empty (e.g. --report-junit-filename myreport.xml)
trans-unit.target: '--report-junit-filename' file name part must not be empty (e.g. --report-junit-filename myreport.xml)
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--report-junit-filename"} or example command {Locked="--report-junit-filename myreport.xml"}.

trans-unit.source: The name of the generated JUnit XML report. May include a relative or absolute path; relative paths are resolved against the test results directory and missing directories are created. Supports the following placeholders: {pname} (test application name), {pid} (process ID), {asm} (entry assembly name), {tfm} (target framework moniker), {arch} (process architecture), {time} (timestamp). Example: MyReport_{tfm}.xml
trans-unit.target: The name of the generated JUnit XML report. May include a relative or absolute path; relative paths are resolved against the test results directory and missing directories are created. Supports the following placeholders: {pname} (test application name), {pid} (process ID), {asm} (entry assembly name), {tfm} (target framework moniker), {arch} (process architecture), {time} (timestamp). Example: MyReport_{tfm}.xml
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--report-junit-filename"}, format names {Locked="JUnit"}{Locked="XML"}, placeholder tokens {Locked="{pname}"}{Locked="{pid}"}{Locked="{asm}"}{Locked="{tfm}"}{Locked="{time}"}, file extension {Locked=".xml"}, or example file name {Locked="MyReport_{tfm}.xml"}.

trans-unit.source: '--report-junit-filename' relative paths must stay under the test results directory (e.g. --report-junit-filename nested/myreport.xml)
trans-unit.target: Die relativen Pfade für „--report-html-filename“ müssen im Verzeichnis mit den Testergebnissen bleiben (z. B. --report-junit-filename nested/myreport.xml)

trans-unit.source: '--report-junit-filename' requires '--report-junit' to be enabled
trans-unit.target: Für „--report-junit-filename“ muss „--report-junit“ aktiviert sein

trans-unit.source: Produce a JUnit XML report for the current test session
trans-unit.target: Erstellen eines JUnit-XML-Berichts für die aktuelle Testsitzung

trans-unit.source: JUnit XML report generator
trans-unit.target: JUnit XML-Berichtsgenerator

trans-unit.source: '--report-junit' cannot be enabled when using '--list-tests'
trans-unit.target: „--report-junit“ kann bei Verwendung von „--list-tests“ nicht aktiviert werden

trans-unit.source: Enable generating a JUnit XML report
trans-unit.target: Generieren eines JUnit-XML-Berichts aktivieren
'--report-junit-filename' relative paths must stay under the test results directory (e.g. --report-junit-filename nested/myreport.xml)
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--report-junit-filename"}, file extension {Locked=".xml"}, or example path {Locked="nested/myreport.xml"}.

trans-unit.source: '--report-junit-filename' requires '--report-junit' to be enabled
trans-unit.target: '--report-junit-filename' requires '--report-junit' to be enabled

trans-unit.source: Produce a JUnit XML report for the current test session
trans-unit.target: Produce a JUnit XML report for the current test session

trans-unit.source: JUnit XML report generator
trans-unit.target: JUnit XML report generator

trans-unit.source: '--report-junit' cannot be enabled when using '--list-tests'
trans-unit.target: '--report-junit' cannot be enabled when using '--list-tests'

trans-unit.source: Enable generating a JUnit XML report
trans-unit.target: Enable generating a JUnit XML report
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--report-junit"} or format names {Locked="JUnit"}{Locked="XML"}.
